mapper.select:
SELECT A.CPNY_ID, A.VAC_TP, A.VAC_ID, TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS STRT_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.TOT_VAC_CNT) AS TOT_VAC_CNT, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_YEAR_VAC) AS LAST_YEAR_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.ADD_VAC) AS ADD_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.USE_VAC_CNT) AS USE_VAC_CNT, A.REMARK, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, A.CREATED_BY, A.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, A.UPDATED_BY, A.UPDATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(A.MENT_VAC) AS MENT_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.WORK_MONTH) AS WORK_MONTH, A.IS_LOCKED, A.REASON_WUJIA, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_YEAR_CAL) AS LAST_YEAR_CAL, TO_CHAR(A.YEAR_VAC_CAL) AS YEAR_VAC_CAL, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_YEAR_CAL_2) AS LAST_YEAR_CAL_2, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/01/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/01/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/01/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/01/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_1, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/02/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/02/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/02/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/02/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_2, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/03/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/03/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/03/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/03/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_3, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/04/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/04/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/04/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/04/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_4, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/05/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/05/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/05/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/05/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_5, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/06/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/06/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/06/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/06/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_6, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/07/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/07/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/07/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/07/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_7, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/08/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/08/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/08/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/08/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_8, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/09/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/09/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/09/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/09/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_9, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/10/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/10/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/10/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/10/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_10, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/11/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/11/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/11/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/11/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_11, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/12/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/12/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') + AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/12/01', TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY') || '/12/01', 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1) - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC_12, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') ) AS USE_VAC, TO_CHAR( AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') ) AS AFFIRM_USE_VAC, HE.PERSON_ID, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, HE.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME FROM AR_VAC_EMP A INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON A.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE A.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VAC_ID = #{vacId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND ( UPPER(HE.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR UPPER(HE.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HE.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
ORDER BY HE.DEPTNO, HE.EMPID
